user.title: Volkswagen Connect Configuration
user.description:
Fill in Volkswagen Connect information

S-PIN is required for some specific options such as lock/unlock and combustion engine heating start/stop

data.mutable: Uncheck to make the car 'read only'. Keep checked to interact with the car
data.country: Country where your car was sold
data.country_custom: Custom country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, only if 'Other' selected above)
data.name: Name your car (defaults to VIN number)
data.convert: Select if you wan to make any distance unit conversions

select_vehicle.title: Vehicle
select_vehicle.description: The following vehicles was found. Please select the vehicle you wish to monitor

data.description: Re-authenticate with your Volkswagen Connect account. Make sure to accept any new EULA in the Volkswagen Connect portal before proceeding.

error.cannot_connect: Could not login to Volkswagen Connect, please check your credentials and verify that the service is working. This can be caused by an update to terms and conditions, try logging in using the app or Volkswagen Connect portal.
error.cannot_update: Could not query update from Volkswagen Connect
error.invalid_country_code: Please enter a valid 2-letter country code (e.g. US, DE, NL)

data.country: Country where your car was sold
data.mutable: Enable car control (uncheck for read-only mode)
data.convert: Select if you want to make any distance unit conversions

confirm_country.title: Confirm your country for Volkswagen Connect

confirm.title: Confirm your country
confirm.description: A configuration update requires confirming the country for your VW vehicle. Your current setting is '{country}'. Please confirm or select the correct country.
